THERESA-AMIYA_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.title: Encounter with Amiya
THERESA-AMIYA_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.pages.INIT:
You follow a [jitter]low rumbling sound[/jitter] to its source: in a serene clearing, you see a familiar figure—[sine][pink]Amiya[/pink][/sine] stands there, her [sine][gold]rings[/gold][/sine] glowing faintly.

She turns around and gazes at you gently. "Doctor, I've been waiting for you."
THERESA-AMIYA_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.pages.SUMM:
Amiya smiles and reaches out her hand. "Let's walk together, Doctor."

You feel a warm power flowing into your heart.
THERESA-AMIYA_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.pages.BATH:
You feel it's not the right time... You decide to bottle some water and bid farewell to Amiya.

This should come in handy.
THERESA-WISDEL_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.title: Encounter with Wisdel
THERESA-WISDEL_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.pages.INI:
You stumble upon a [jitter]dim corner[/jitter]: in an abandoned bunker, you see a familiar figure—[sine][red]Wisdel[/red][/sine] is leaning there, her [sine][gold]launcher[/gold][/sine] exuding a dangerous aura.

She looks up and fixes you with a sharp gaze. "Theresa, you finally came."
THERESA-WISDEL_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.pages.SUM:
Wisdel grins and pats her launcher. "Let's go, Theresa. Let's blow all those nuisances away."

You feel a wild power flowing into your heart.
THERESA-WISDEL_ENCOUNTER_EVENT.pages.LEA:
You feel it's not the right time... Wisdel shrugs.

"Suit yourself."
